title: SΔϕ-08 - Agency-Responsibility-Freedom Closure
package_title: SΔϕ-08 - Agency-Responsibility-Freedom Closure: Irreversible Path Constraint and Operational Freedom AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / agency-responsibility-freedom closure audit module
core_claim: ARF Closure occurs when agency, responsibility, and freedom become structurally connected through path generation, path selection, execution, irreversible path constraint, responsibility internalization, boundary closure, and future path redistribution.

primary_formulae.core: ARF Closure = Agency + Responsibility + Freedom + Boundary Closure + Irreversible Path Constraint
primary_formulae.operational: Path Generation -> Path Selection -> Execution -> Irreversible Path Constraint -> Cost Internalization -> Boundary Closure -> Future Path Redistribution
primary_formulae.warning: ARF Closure is not metaphysical free will, moral guilt, legal liability, randomness, or autonomy theater.

do_not_use_as: proof that autonomy theater is freedom
proof that agency automatically equals responsibility
